allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD='Getinmotion2025*' psql -h 52.7.98.126 -p 5432 -U postgres -d getinmotion -c "SELECT id, email, is_super_admin FROM auth.users WHERE email = 'nicolas@getinmotion.io';")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='Getinmotion2025*' psql -h 52.7.98.126 -p 5432 -U postgres -d getinmotion -c "UPDATE auth.users SET is_super_admin = true WHERE email = 'nicolas@getinmotion.io'; SELECT id, email, is_super_admin FROM auth.users WHERE email = 'nicolas@getinmotion.io';")

PowerShell(New-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName "Telar API dev \(1010\)" -Direction Inbound -Protocol TCP -LocalPort 1010 -Action Allow -Profile Private -Description "Permite acceso local al servidor NestJS en dev")

PowerShell(New-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName "Telar Frontend dev \(8080\)" -Direction Inbound -Protocol TCP -LocalPort 8080 -Action Allow -Profile Private -Description "Permite acceso local al frontend Vite en dev")

PowerShell(New-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName "Telar Frontend dev \(8081\)" -Direction Inbound -Protocol TCP -LocalPort 8081 -Action Allow -Profile Private -Description "Permite acceso local al frontend Vite en dev \(puerto alternativo\)")
